历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 3003 → 14578 → 7835 → 9046 → 8295, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, it dropped to 14578 and then quickly rebounded. In the past three years, it oscillated between 7835 and 9046, with a baseline of approximately 8295 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 3 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 2, a 33% reduction from 2025's 3, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 81st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable; reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 49th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; no records of gaps in admissions; Foreign Language and Literature is A+, but the Physics Category enrollment major is Data Science and Big Data Technology (Cognitive Science Big Data), which belongs to the computer/data science direction, with low correlation to the university's advantageous language disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category. In 2024, the computer category popularity assessment was recommended. Although it has cooled down from the high recommendation in 2023, it remains relatively hot and attractive to candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province is estimated to be about 79,936, based on approximately 72.1% of total candidates, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Jilin Province is not the main source of students for this university, and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8295, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 33% (significantly intensifying competition), a slight decrease in total candidates (slightly easing competition), and the relatively hot popularity of the data science major, combined with the slight decrease in candidate scale and the attractiveness of popular majors, a small upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 6666, with a range of 6166–7166.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai International Studies University only enrolls one major (Data Science and Big Data Technology) in the Physics Category in Jilin Province, with a very small number of students (2), leading to high ranking fluctuation risk. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 6166–7166 can attempt to apply; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<6166) have a higher probability of admission; those with rankings near the upper limit (>7166) should be cautious and prepare other universities as backups.
